>Description:
I have updated databases/libzdb to version 2.11.2.

A patch is attached.
>How-To-Repeat:
n/a
>Fix:
n/a
diff -ruN libzdb.orig/Makefile libzdb/Makefile
--- libzdb.orig/Makefile	2013-05-10 20:03:58.000000000 -0500
+++ libzdb/Makefile	2013-05-10 20:04:37.000000000 -0500
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libzdb
-PORTVERSION=	2.11.1
+PORTVERSION=	2.11.2
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.tildeslash.com/libzdb/dist/ \
 		http://www.c-s.li/ports/
diff -ruN libzdb.orig/distinfo libzdb/distinfo
--- libzdb.orig/distinfo	2013-05-10 20:03:58.000000000 -0500
+++ libzdb/distinfo	2013-05-10 20:04:45.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libzdb-2.11.1.tar.gz) = 390cdee70dcdd77f4ae113949564056b7a0648a931a918c0b626fa7e6d820c8c
-SIZE (libzdb-2.11.1.tar.gz) = 599354
+SHA256 (libzdb-2.11.2.tar.gz) = 23d8cc201f4d4417963a440005bf3a93fc2010032a275056b0970c060910a298
+SIZE (libzdb-2.11.2.tar.gz) = 603149
